name: io.github.jordanburke/functype-mcp-server
description: MCP server for functype documentation lookup and TypeScript code validation.

environmentVariables.name: PORT
environmentVariables.description: HTTP port (default: 3000) — only used with httpStream transport

environmentVariables.name: HOST
environmentVariables.description: HTTP host (default: 0.0.0.0) — only used with httpStream transport
